seo.description: Richardson Landscape Inc offers professional landscaping, lawn care, hardscaping, and design services in Dallas, TX. Family-owned since 1992. Call (972) 380-9087 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Dallas's Premier Landscaping & Lawn Care Experts
hero.subheadline: Transform your outdoor space with custom design, expert installation, and meticulous maintenance—backed by decades of local experience.

featureSections.title: Landscapes That Reflect Your Style
featureSections.body: From lush gardens to modern hardscapes, our design-build process ensures every detail aligns with your vision. We handle everything from initial concept to final planting.
bullets: Native plant selection for Dallas climate
featureSections.cardBody: Our team collaborates with you to create a cohesive plan that maximizes curb appeal and functionality.

featureSections.title: A Greener, Healthier Lawn—All Year Long
featureSections.body: Our comprehensive lawn care programs include fertilization, weed control, aeration, and overseeding tailored to Dallas's unique soil and weather conditions.
bullets: Consistent scheduling so you never worry
featureSections.cardBody: We take the guesswork out of lawn care with proven treatments and timely applications.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise

whyChooseUs.title: Full-Service Convenience

cta.headline: Ready to Elevate Your Outdoor Living?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: At Richardson Landscape Inc, we offer a full range of landscaping and lawn care services designed to enhance your property's beauty and value. From one-time transformations to ongoing maintenance, our experienced team delivers exceptional results.

services.title: Custom Landscape Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Turn your vision into reality with personalized design and expert installation.
services.longDescription: Our design-build process begins with a thorough consultation to understand your style, needs, and budget. We create detailed plans and 3D renderings, then bring them to life with skilled installation of plants, trees, flowers, and hardscape elements. We source the best materials and plants suited to Dallas's climate for long-lasting beauty.
benefits: Tailored designs that reflect your personality
Increased property value and curb appeal
Seamless integration of softscape and hardscape
Professional project management from start to finish

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet on-site to discuss your ideas, measure the space, and assess conditions.

process.title: Design & Proposal
process.description: Our designer creates a custom plan with plant selections, layout, and cost estimate.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our crew installs everything with precision, ensuring minimal disruption to your daily life.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape installation take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary based on scope. A full backyard transformation can take 1-3 weeks. We provide a detailed schedule during the proposal phase.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage all necessary permits for hardscape and structural elements as part of our service.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your lawn lush and healthy with our comprehensive care programs.
services.longDescription: Our lawn care programs are designed to address the specific needs of Dallas turf. We offer fertilization, weed control, aeration, overseeding, and seasonal cleanups. Our technicians are licensed and trained to apply treatments safely and effectively. We also provide regular mowing, edging, and trimming for a manicured look.
benefits: Thicker, greener grass with fewer weeds
Customized treatment schedules for your lawn type
Free lawn analysis to identify issues early

process.title: Lawn Assessment
process.description: We test soil and inspect turf to create a tailored treatment plan.

process.title: Treatment Schedule
process.description: We apply fertilizers, pre-emergents, and post-emergents at optimal times.

process.title: Ongoing Monitoring
process.description: Our team visits regularly to adjust care and address any problems.

faqs.question: Are your lawn products safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use pet- and child-safe products whenever possible and provide guidance on re-entry times.

faqs.question: How often should I water after treatment?
faqs.answer: We provide specific watering instructions after each application to maximize effectiveness.

services.title: Hardscaping: Patios, Walkways & More
services.shortDescription: Create functional, beautiful outdoor living spaces with durable hardscapes.
services.longDescription: Our hardscaping services include patios, walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and driveways. We use high-quality pavers, natural stone, and concrete to build structures that complement your landscape and stand the test of time. Our designs blend aesthetics with functionality.
benefits: Custom designs that match your home's architecture

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We assess drainage, soil stability, and access to plan a solid foundation.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We guide you through paver and stone choices to match your style and budget.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our masons install with precision, ensuring proper base, leveling, and finishing.

faqs.question: What is the lifespan of a paver patio?
faqs.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, paver patios can last 20-30 years or more.

faqs.question: Do you offer sealing services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can seal your hardscape to protect against stains and weather.

services.title: Irrigation & Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Efficient watering and drainage systems to protect your landscape.
services.longDescription: Proper irrigation and drainage are critical to a healthy landscape. We design and install sprinkler systems with smart controllers that adjust watering based on weather. We also solve drainage issues with French drains, dry wells, and grading to prevent pooling and erosion.
benefits: Water savings up to 30% with smart technology
Protects your foundation and landscaping from water damage

process.title: System Design
process.description: We map your property and design zones for optimal coverage.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team trenches, lays pipes, and installs heads and controllers.

process.title: Programming & Testing
process.description: We set schedules, test coverage, and ensure everything works perfectly.

faqs.question: Can you retrofit an existing system?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can upgrade old systems with smart controllers and efficient nozzles.

faqs.question: How do you handle drainage in clay soil?
faqs.answer: We use French drains and grading techniques specifically designed for Dallas's heavy clay soil.

about.headline: Over 30 Years of Excellence in Dallas Landscaping
about.mission: Our mission is to enhance the beauty and functionality of outdoor spaces in Dallas through expert design, quality craftsmanship, and exceptional customer service.
story: Richardson Landscape Inc was founded in 1992 by John Richardson with a simple philosophy: treat every yard as if it were your own. Starting with a single truck and a passion for horticulture, John built a reputation for reliability and artistry. Over the decades, the company has grown into a full-service landscaping firm serving hundreds of Dallas homeowners and businesses.

Today, we remain family-owned and operated, with a team of skilled designers, horticulturists, and masons who share John's commitment to quality. We stay current with industry trends and sustainable practices, ensuring our clients receive the best solutions for their landscapes.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, use quality materials, and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Every project receives meticulous attention to detail from start to finish.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: We listen to your needs and communicate clearly throughout the process.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we take pride in making Dallas neighborhoods more beautiful.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Let's discuss your landscaping vision. We'll provide a detailed proposal with no obligation.
